senses.definition: furniture with a back and often four legs that we can use for sitting
a seat, often with four legs, that does not include a any support for one's back or arms
a French-style armchair with upholstered sides and back and an exposed wooden frame
a chair with side supports for the arms and a comfortable backrest, often used for relaxation or reading

examples.x: The dog loves to curl up in the armchair when no one’s looking.
He sank into the armchair after a long day at work.
He sat in the armchair by the fire, reading a book.
She bought a new armchair with soft cushions for the study.
The living room had a cozy armchair and a matching sofa.

senses.definition: an upholstered bench often built into a wall or used as built-in seating in a dining or kitchen area

examples.x: The restaurant had a cozy corner with a banquette where families could sit together.
She decided to add a banquette in the kitchen to make the dining area more comfortable.
The banquette along the wall was upholstered in soft leather, making it both stylish and practical.
During the renovation, they replaced the old chairs with a custom-built banquette to save space.
The café featured a banquette with colorful cushions, creating a vibrant seating arrangement.

senses.definition: a long and hard seat that is normally made of metal or wood and two or multiple people can sit on

examples.x: I like to sit on the bench and watch people walking by.
She found a comfortable bench to rest and read her book.
She tied her shoelaces on the bench before going for a run.
They gathered around the bench to have a group discussion.

senses.definition: a type of chair with a curved back and armrests, resembling the shape of a barrel

examples.x: She relaxed in the cozy barrel chair by the window, enjoying the view.
The living room looked more inviting after we added a barrel chair in the corner.
A bright red barrel chair added a pop of color to the neutral-toned room.
The designer chose a soft fabric to upholster the barrel chair, making it feel even more luxurious.
She placed a barrel chair next to the bookshelf for a quiet reading spot.

senses.definition: a type of chair that features a basket-shaped seat made of woven materials such as wicker, rattan, or cane

examples.x: The basket chair on the porch looks perfect for relaxing in the evening.
The living room was brightened up by the addition of a cozy basket chair.
She sat in the basket chair, enjoying the cool breeze coming through the window.
After a long day, he loved sitting in his basket chair with a good book.
The child curled up in the basket chair, playing with her toys.

senses.definition: a soft, cushioned chair filled with small pieces of material that conforms to the shape of the body for comfortable sitting or lounging
a type of furniture made by bending wood into curved shapes and then laminating several layers together to create a strong and durable piece of furniture

examples.x: The chair was made from bentwood, giving it a sleek and modern appearance.
The bentwood design of the rocking chair makes it both functional and beautiful.
I love the comfort and style of bentwood furniture in my living room.
He chose a bentwood table for the dining room because of its elegant curves.
The artisan skillfully crafted a bentwood frame for the new lounge chair.

senses.definition: a spacious armchair that comes with elongated armrests that can be folded inward to function as leg rests

examples.x: The Berbice chair in the living room added a touch of elegance to the space.
She sat in the Berbice chair, enjoying the comfort of its curved backrest.
The antique store had a beautiful Berbice chair that caught my eye.
The rich wood of the Berbice chair matched perfectly with the dark hardwood floors.
After a long day, he relaxed in the Berbice chair, appreciating its sturdy support.

senses.definition: a type of dining chair with arms, usually placed at the head of the table
a type of folding chair designed for outdoor use, typically with a frame of wood or metal and a fabric or canvas seat and back that can be adjusted to recline

examples.x: She relaxed in her deck chair by the pool, enjoying the warm sun.
The deck chair was perfect for lounging on the beach all afternoon.
After a long hike, they sat down on the deck chairs to rest and enjoy the view.
The deck chair collapsed when he leaned back too far, but luckily, he was not hurt.
We packed a couple of deck chairs for our trip to the lake.

senses.definition: a chair designed for use at a dining table
a large and comfortable chair or armchair

examples.x: After a long day, I like to relax in my easy chair with a good book.
The easy chair by the window is perfect for watching the sunset.
She sank into the easy chair and closed her eyes, enjoying the soft cushions.
He added an easy chair to his study, making it a cozy spot for reading.
I spent the afternoon lounging in the easy chair, sipping tea and listening to music.

senses.definition: a French armchair with open sides, upholstered seat, back, and arms, and exposed wood frames

examples.x: The antique shop had a beautiful fauteuil with intricate carvings on its wooden frame.
The fauteuil was the perfect spot to relax after a long day of work.
She sat comfortably in the fauteuil, enjoying her afternoon tea by the window.
The designer recommended placing a fauteuil near the fireplace for a welcoming look.
He found an old fauteuil in his grandmother’s house, which had been passed down for generations.

senses.definition: a type of chair with a backrest that is shaped like a violin or fiddle

examples.x: She sat in the fiddle-back chair by the window, enjoying the afternoon sun.
The dining room was decorated with several fiddle-back chairs around the large wooden table.
The intricate design of the fiddle-back chair added a touch of elegance to the room.
The antique shop had a beautiful fiddle-back chair in the corner, which caught my attention immediately.
He found a vintage fiddle-back chair at the flea market, and it became the centerpiece of his living room.

senses.definition: a type of chair that can be easily folded and stored when not in use

examples.x: The folding chair was perfect for the outdoor picnic since it could be easily packed away after use.
We needed extra seating for the party, so we brought out a few folding chairs from the garage.
She set up a folding chair next to the campfire to enjoy the warmth on a chilly evening.
For the family reunion, we rented a dozen folding chairs to accommodate all the guests.
The folding chair was ideal for the concert, as it was lightweight and easy to carry.

senses.definition: a type of outdoor furniture that is designed to be used in a garden or outdoor space

examples.x: The garden chair was placed under the tree, offering a perfect spot for reading.
After a long day, I sat in the garden chair to relax and enjoy the sunset.
The wooden garden chair looked beautiful next to the blooming flowers.
They added colorful cushions to the garden chair for extra comfort.
She sat in the garden chair, sipping tea and listening to the birds sing.

senses.definition: a type of low stool or cushion used for sitting or as a footrest
a special type of chair with long legs used by a small child or baby to sit in have a meal
a type of chair designed to help improve posture and reduce lower back pain by distributing weight between the buttocks and shins and providing support for the knees

examples.x: After years of back pain, she decided to try a kneeling chair to improve her posture.
He found the kneeling chair uncomfortable at first but soon got used to the unique sitting position.
Kneeling chairs are often recommended by chiropractors to help maintain proper spinal alignment.
The office provided a kneeling chair for employees who wanted to reduce strain on their backs.
She spent hours working on her computer with the kneeling chair, feeling less discomfort than usual.

senses.definition: a type of chair with horizontal slats resembling a ladder on the backrest

examples.x: The old farmhouse had a set of ladder-back chairs around the dining table.
I found a beautiful ladder-back chair at the antique store.
The kitchen was decorated with wooden ladder-back chairs, giving it a rustic feel.
She sat in a ladder-back chair by the window, enjoying the afternoon sun.
The artist painted a series of ladder-back chairs in various colors.

senses.definition: an armchair that comes with a support for one's feet and a movable back on which one can recline and relax, particularly used outdoors
a type of armchair with adjustable back and arms that can be lowered to create a flat surface

examples.x: The Morris chair in the living room has a beautiful wooden frame and a comfy, adjustable backrest.
After a long day, he relaxed in his Morris chair, tilting the backrest to the perfect angle.
The vintage Morris chair added a touch of elegance to the room with its classic design.
She loves curling up with a good book in her Morris chair, which reclines for ultimate comfort.
We decided to add a Morris chair to our reading nook for a cozy and stylish seating option.

senses.definition: a rocking chair with a stationary base and a platform that moves with the chair's back and seat

examples.x: The platform rocker in the living room provided the perfect spot for reading a book in the afternoon.
She relaxed in her platform rocker, enjoying the gentle rocking motion while watching the sunset.
After a long day, he sank into the cozy platform rocker and let the rhythmic rocking help him unwind.
The nursery had a comfortable platform rocker for the parents to use while soothing their baby to sleep.
They placed a platform rocker by the fireplace, creating a cozy corner for quiet moments.

senses.definition: a low, cushioned seat or footstool that is typically round or cylindrical in shape
a chair with a backrest that tilts backwards and a footrest that extends out in front of the seat

examples.x: After a long day at work, she sank into her reclining chair and stretched out her legs.
The reclining chair in the living room was perfect for watching movies on the weekend.
He adjusted the footrest on his reclining chair to relax after his workout.
The reclining chair in the corner of the room is my favorite spot to unwind.
The elderly woman enjoys sitting in her reclining chair with a good book.

senses.definition: a simple chair without arms or upholstery, usually made of wood and designed for basic seating

examples.x: The straight chair is perfect for the dining table, offering simple and sturdy seating.
The office was filled with straight chairs around a long conference table.
He preferred the straight chair over the lounge chair for working on his projects.
The straight chair was uncomfortable after a few hours, but it served its purpose.
They placed a row of straight chairs along the wall for extra seating during the event.

senses.definition: a type of hanging chair with a round egg-shaped seat that swings and can be used for indoor or outdoor seating

examples.x: The swing egg chair on the patio was the perfect spot to relax and enjoy the view.
She spent the afternoon reading in the swing egg chair, gently rocking back and forth.
The kids took turns sitting in the swing egg chair, laughing as it swayed in the breeze.
After a long day, he loved unwinding in his cozy swing egg chair on the balcony.
The swing egg chair adds a touch of style and comfort to the outdoor lounge area.

senses.definition: a type of chair that can rotate 360 degrees around a central axis, allowing the seated person to easily turn and face different directions

examples.x: The swivel chair was comfortable enough for long meetings, with a padded seat and adjustable height.
The children fought over who would sit in the swivel chair during family game night.
I adjusted the swivel chair to a lower position to make it easier to reach the computer.
The office has swivel chairs that allow employees to move around easily while working at their desks.

senses.definition: a small and cozy chair with a rounded back and armrests, resembling the shape of a traditional bathtub

examples.x: The tub chair in the corner of the room is perfect for reading a book.
She sank into the soft tub chair by the window and relaxed.
The modern tub chair added a touch of elegance to the living room.
He chose a comfortable tub chair for his office to encourage long hours of work.
The cozy tub chair made the perfect spot for a quiet afternoon nap.

senses.definition: a wooden chair characterized by a solid, shaped wooden seat and distinctive, turned spindle backrest

examples.x: The Windsor chair in the dining room added a touch of rustic charm to the space.
She sat comfortably in the Windsor chair, enjoying the warmth of the fireplace.
He decided to refinish the old Windsor chair, restoring its original beauty.

senses.definition: a type of armchair characterized by its high back, angled wings or "ears" on either side to protect the sitter from drafts, and often a deep seat

examples.x: She relaxed in the wing chair by the fireplace, enjoying the warmth of the fire.
The wing chair in the corner of the room was the perfect spot for reading a book.
I prefer sitting in the wing chair when I need a quiet place to think.
After a long day, she sank into the soft wing chair, ready to unwind.

senses.definition: a chair mounted on two curved pieces of wood to allow enough mobility for the chair to move back and forth when someone sits on it

examples.x: She sat in the rocking chair on the porch, enjoying the warm afternoon breeze.
The baby fell asleep quickly in the rocking chair as her mother gently rocked her.
I love to relax in my rocking chair by the fireplace during winter evenings.
After a long day, she settled into her rocking chair with a good book.
They placed a comfortable rocking chair in the nursery for late-night feedings.

senses.definition: a type of chair that is designed to stand out and add a decorative or functional element to a room's decor
a small low seat, typically without a backrest, designed to be used with a vanity or dressing table
a low seat or a small stool used to elevate the feet while sitting
a tall, narrow stool with a footrest, designed for seating at a bar or high counter
a type of stool that is specifically designed for use at a kitchen counter or bar-height table, and typically has a seat height of 24 to 26 inches
a small and decorative stool that is often used as a seat or a side table in outdoor spaces like gardens, patios, and decks
a low upholstered seat or footstool without a back or arms
a small portable stool that allows the user to reach objects or high places that they would not be able to reach otherwise
a portable seat made with a collapsible frame that can be easily stored or transported
the vertical supports that are attached to the seat or base of a piece of furniture, such as a chair or table, and provide stability and support
the part of a chair, bench, or sofa that supports the back and may extend up to the shoulders or head
a part of a chair or sofa that is designed to support the arms of a seated person, providing comfort and relaxation
a padded covering for the seat and backrest of the chair
the part of a chair or a sofa where one sits, typically consisting of a flat, horizontal surface supported by legs or a frame
a chair that is designed to massage and manipulate the muscles and soft tissues of the body, typically using electronic motors and rollers
